action.reasoning: Observation: exprate ~0.069-0.072 (val peak 0.087), loss plateaus ~1.17; debug shows good simple preds (e.g. '2 6', partial sqrt/frac) but frequent symbol errors (\mbox, wrong sub/superscripts/numbers, overgeneration). Analysis: core ResNet+attention+aspect-pad is sound and loss decreases, but truncated model.py (incomplete generate with broken EOS handling) and train.py (incomplete loop/loss) are root causes of suboptimal preds; teacher-forcing shift now aligned but generate must stop per-sample at EOS=2 and exclude SOS/EOS from output latex. Decision: supply fully complete model.py (fixed generate with per-sample finished/EOS logic, no truncation), complete train.py (correct shifted loss vs targets[:,1:], grad_clip=1.0, AdamW+plateau scheduler on val_exprate, full jsonl logging per batch/epoch, 40 epochs, bs=16 for stability), minor predict/debug robustness (strict=False if needed but keep True). Run full train+debug then submit_eval on best.pt; expect fix to lift exprate >0.08.

---

---

---

Pred: k = 1 0 0 0 0
